scripts.dev:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply clawdentity-db-dev --local --env local && wrangler dev --env local --ip 0.0.0.0 --port 8788
scripts.deploy:dev: wrangler d1 migrations apply clawdentity-db-dev --remote --env dev && wrangler deploy --env dev
scripts.deploy:production: wrangler d1 migrations apply clawdentity-db --remote --env production && wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply clawdentity-db-dev --local --env local
